translations.title: How to Choose the Perfect Sofa for Your Living Room
translations.excerpt: Finding the right sofa involves more than just picking a colour. Here's our complete guide.
translations.content:
The sofa is often the centrepiece of a living room. When choosing one, consider the size of your room, the existing colour palette, and how you actually use the space.

Material matters too: leather is durable and easy to clean, while fabric offers more texture and warmth. Whatever you choose, sit in it first — comfort is non-negotiable.
translations.meta_title: How to Choose a Sofa | Demo Blog
translations.meta_description: Complete guide to choosing the right sofa.
